Generates immutable, non-editable PDF traceability reports for

Single Page Application running in the user's browser. Used by QA
Managers and Lab Operators to manage the laboratory, monitor

Stores all structured domain data: laboratories, equipment, BPM

Handles authentication, user registration, JWT token management, role
assignment and access control per bounded context.
Manages laboratory institutional data, staff registry, pharmaceutical
product catalogue and raw material inventory.
Handles industrial equipment lifecycle, IoT sensor binding, BPM
Ingests IoT telemetry from sensors, stores measurements and exposes
Core domain: evaluates each measurement against BPM parameters,
classifies deviations, triggers alerts and blocks batches.
Manages batch production lifecycle: creation, raw material traceability,
digital signature release and rejection records.
Generates immutable PDF traceability reports, exports equipment event
logs and calculates quality KPI metrics.
Provides cross-cutting infrastructure: audit logging, exception handling,
JWT filter, security config and value objects.
